# Test basic struct to JSON schema conversion

exec sourcereflect -pretty -type User user.go
cmp stdout expected.json

-- user.go --
package main

type User struct {
	ID        int               `json:"id"`
	Username  string            `json:"username"`
	Email     string            `json:"email"`
	Age       int               `json:"age,omitempty"`
	IsActive  bool              `json:"is_active"`
	Tags      []string          `json:"tags"`
	Settings  map[string]string `json:"settings"`
}

-- expected.json --
{
  "type": "object",
  "title": "User",
  "properties": {
    "age": {
      "type": "integer"
    },
    "email": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "id": {
      "type": "integer"
    },
    "is_active": {
      "type": "boolean"
    },
    "settings": {
      "type": "object",
      "additionalProperties": {
        "type": "string"
      }
    },
    "tags": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "type": "string"
      }
    },
    "username": {
      "type": "string"
    }
  },
  "required": [
    "id",
    "username",
    "email",
    "is_active",
    "tags",
    "settings"
  ]
}
